task_completion.description: Open the Jolly Lobby Track application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jolly Lobby Track main window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Company reference list or data entry form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or dialog for managing reference lists, specifically the 'Company' list, is open.
The text 'Aramark' is typed into the Company name input field.
The text 'Philadelphia' is typed into the City input field.
The save or add button is clicked, or the new record with 'Aramark' and 'Philadelphia' is visible in the saved Company reference list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jolly Lobby Track GUI to add the record
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry is happening within the Jolly Lobby Track application windows, not via terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to simulate the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Aramark' and 'Philadelphia' are not just typed into Notepad or another text editor.
The application window has standard OS borders, active input fields, and standard UI elements for Jolly Lobby Track.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target company to add: 'Aramark'. Target city: 'Philadelphia'. The VLM should look for these exact strings entered into the Jolly Lobby Track application's Company reference list.
